title: Icona Bay - 10x8 inch Picture Frames - Silver, 6 Pack - Beautifully Detailed Moulding - Contemporary Picture Frame Set - Wall Mount or Table Top - Inspirations Collection
features: CLASSIC STYLE - Beautiful frames with beaded edge, complements any décor; Durable construction, attractive polished finish
PREMIUM MATERIALS - Enjoy the timeless look of wood without the upkeep; This durable PS resin frame offer the charm of natural texture with long-lasting style and strength

WALL MOUNT or TABLE TOP - Includes D-ring hooks to easily hang artwork or photographs in either portrait or landscape orientation; Versatile kickstand easel lets you display either horizontally or vertically

MULTIPLE PACK SIZES AVAILABLE - The Inspirations Collection by Icona Bay is available in various colours: Black, Gold, Grey, Silver & White; Sizes: 6x4", 7x5", 10x8", 10x15 cm & 13x18 cm; Packs: 1-pack and 6-pack
INCLUDES - 6 Silver frames (fits standard 10 x 8 inch / 25 x 20 centimetre pictures, photos or prints); High-definition glass for clarity and image protection
